name: ADB_Helper Redesign v1.0
description: Modern dev-tool aesthetic with high contrast and adaptive density for Windows 11 & Ubuntu 22+
changes: Increased base font sizes: 13px (up from 12px) for better readability on Windows 11 & Ubuntu 22+
Fixed dark theme: darker background #05070a, higher contrast surfaces #181d24, #0d1117
Fixed light theme: light gray #e6e9ee background with white surfaces for maximum contrast
Removed all box-shadows, using only crisp 1px borders for 'dev tool' aesthetic
Window fixed at 100vh — content scrolls internally, not the whole window
Sidebar auto-collapses to 64px icon-only mode when window width < 1100px
Added filler content: Scrcpy (Recent launches), Device Buttons (Recent actions log)
Replaced macOS keyboard shortcuts (⌘) with Windows/Linux Ctrl+ equivalents
Status bar simplified: removed ADB version, window width, density indicator
Button heights increased to 44px for comfortable touch targets
Accent color: teal #2ec5c5 consistent across light & dark modes
